description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a double-edged design and a pointed tip, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The blade is uniformly dark in color, giving it a sleek, modern, or possibly ceremonial appearance. The crossguard is simple and straight, providing basic hand protection, and is also dark, matching the blade and handle. The handle is cylindrical and tapers slightly towards a rounded pommel, which appears solid and functional for grip. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements on any part of the sword, emphasizing a utilitarian or minimalist style. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of metal, likely steel, with a consistent finish across all components.
description: A long, double-edged, dark-colored sword with a straight blade, simple crossguard, and cylindrical handle, featuring a minimalist, undecorated design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's narrowness.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlights the slimness of the blade and handle, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle, smooth, dark metal, rounded pommel
